wio_accel_init.message0: initialize Wio Terminal accelerometer data rate %1 range %2
wio_accel_init.tooltip: Initialize the LIS3DHTR over the built-in Wire1 bus; Seeed's example recommends 25 Hz and ±2 g

wio_accel_set_datarate.tooltip: Set the LIS3DHTR output data rate

wio_accel_read_axis.tooltip: Read acceleration on the selected axis in g

wio_accel_read_xyz.message0: read 3-axis acceleration into X %1 Y %2 Z %3
wio_accel_read_xyz.tooltip: Read X, Y, and Z acceleration at once and store the values in variables, in g

wio_accel_data_ready.tooltip: Check whether the LIS3DHTR has new acceleration data

wio_accel_is_connected.tooltip: Check communication with the Wio Terminal built-in LIS3DHTR

wio_accel_on_tap.tooltip: Detect taps on GYROSCOPE_INT1. Suggested thresholds: ±2g 40-80, ±4g 20-40, ±8g 10-20, ±16g 5-10
